extraction_notes: Universal Soldier (SNES) is an unreleased game. The available source (The Cutting Room Floor) documents only development/archival information: that it was a port of Turrican II by The Code Monkeys, contains unused music from the original game, and was never publicly released (replaced by Super Turrican). No gameplay documentation, level design details, sequencing patterns, pacing information, or spatial design patterns are present in the source material. Comprehensive level design extraction is not possible from this archival data tier.
